item.title: SBI Funds IPO Anchor Book 20 Times Subscribed; Draws Capital Group, BlackRock, Goldman, ADIA, GIC
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: The Capital Group Inc., BlackRock Inc., Fidelity Investments and Goldman Sachs Asset Management L.P. are among key investors that participated in the anchor book of SBI Funds Management Ltd., which was subscribed more than 20 times before the company’s initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.
